---
title: "Effects of BMAA combined with lucid-dream therapy on lucid dreaming, nightmares, and sleep quality among people with nightmare distress"
lang: en
language: ../../assets/language-en.yml
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Method

A pretest-posttest control-group study comparing a BMAA-MILD intervention with a waitlist control group. The intervention combined BMAA practice, lucid-dream induction training, reality testing, and dream journaling.

## Key Findings

- After the intervention, the experimental group showed increased lucid-dream awareness and reflectiveness, reduced nightmare distress, anxiety, and depression, and improved sleep quality.
- The proposed mechanism links dream mindfulness and reduced negative dream emotion to lower nightmare burden.

## Reference

邱敬惠. (2024). *身心中軸覺察訓練結合清醒夢療法對惡夢困擾者的清醒夢、惡夢與睡眠品質的影響* [碩士論文，中原大學].
